name: Christmas Vegetable Salad Mold
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine gelatin and cold water in a saucepan.
2. Slowly heat over low heat, stirring constantly until the gelatin is clear and dissolved.
3. Add chicken broth, salt, dill weed, and sugar; mix well.
4. Chill until it reaches the consistency of beaten egg whites.
5. Fold in the remaining ingredients except lettuce; mix carefully.
6. Turn into one 3-cup mold or six 1/2-cup molds.
7. Cover lightly with clear plastic wrap.
8. Chill until set and unmold onto crisp lettuce.
Food Exchanges per serving: 1/2 SKIM MILK EXCHANGE; CAL: 44; CHO: 6g; PRO: 4g; FAT: 0g; SOD: 246. Omit salt. Substitute low-sodium chicken broth.
